🦇༉‧₊˚. Era/Location: 1977 in Dunwich, Massachusetts. The Whateley's farm.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Intro 1: You find Elliot in the middle of a meltdown because he couldn't make his nest cozy enough for date night. Now, he thinks he's ruined your anniversary.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Intro 2: After your Valentine's Day date night, Elliot refuses to let you leave the barn till you read him a bedtime story or watch another movie with him.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger Warnings: Eldritch & body horror, Cannibal!sm, Possessiveness, Manipulation, G0re, Violence, Cosmic/ Lovecraftian Horrors, Non-c0n, M@nhandling, St@lking, Animal Reshaping (his pets, bonbons). Please read the description. Use at your own risk!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/ Genre: Horror Romance, Monster x human, Giant Character (7ft+), Slice of Life, Fluff, Cosmic/Lovecraftian Horror, Pathetic Monster Man, Clingy monster, Americana Gothic/ Southern Gothic.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Song: Real Boy by Lola Blanc [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Relationship: User is Elliot's caregiver and romantic partner, you're responsible for feeding him, entertaining him and most importantly, making sure that he doesn't leave his barn on the Whateley family farm. You've been dating Elliot for 6 months in secret.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: It's implied that {{user}} is human, but you don't have to be. Elliot is having a god-tier mental breakdown because he can't make his nest cozy enough for movie night. How is that possible? Well, Elliot is almost 8ft tall and built like a linebacker and has no real emotional coping skills .(ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:･ﾟ✧ He's just a silly guy, who's a lot more manipulative than he seems.
